word: G5290 - ὑποστρέφω - hypostréphō - hoop-os-tref'-o - Come again

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ὑποστρέφω

- Transliteration: Hupostrepho

- Phonetic: hoop-os-tref'-o

- Definition:

1. to turn back

a. to turn about

2. to return

- Origin: from G5259 and G4762

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G5259 and G4762; to turn under (behind) that is to return (literally or figuratively): - come again return (again back again) turn back (again).
